questionHtml:
Bromobenzene, C6H5Br, can be formed by the reaction of  benzene, C6H6 and bromine, Br2 in presence of the catalyst, FeBr3.

State the name of the mechanism of the reaction.

meta.title: Bromobenzene, C6H5Br, can be formed by the reaction of benzene, C6H6 and bromine, Br2 in presence of the catalyst, FeBr3. State the name of the mechanism of the reaction.
